name: drg. Sinta Dewi Lestari
title: drg.
education: D.D.S., Faculty of Dentistry, Universitas Gadjah Mada, Yogyakarta (2014)
bio: drg. Sinta Dewi Lestari is an experienced dentist with a gentle approach that puts nervous patients at ease. She is skilled in general and aesthetic dentistry, providing comfortable and effective dental care for patients of all ages.
